title: BTBT Stock: ETH and AI War Chest Amid Financial Losses
text: Bit Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: BTBT) traded up 9.03% on April 14, 2026, driven by optimism surrounding its strategic pivot toward Ethereum and AI infrastructure investments. The company's FY2025 results reveal a mixed picture. Revenue grew modestly to $113.6M from $108M, yet profitability collapsed—swinging from a $28.3M profit to an $80.3M loss. Despite this, the balance sheet remains solid with a current ratio of 6.4 and low debt relative to equity, signaling plenty of liquidity. BTBT is rebranding as a Strategic Asset Company focused on Ethereum staking and AI/high-performance computing infrastructure. The company maintains significant holdings, including approximately 155,444 ETH (worth roughly $327M) with 62% staked at a 2.9% annualized yield, plus 27M WhiteFiber shares valued around $322.1M. Wall Street remains cautiously optimistic. B. Riley maintained a Buy rating while cutting its price target to $5 from $6, noting that ETH staking revenue jump to $7M from just $1.8M signals growing returns from its infrastructure strategy. The consensus mean target sits near $5.83. This represents a high-risk, high-volatility play on crypto and AI infrastructure with significant balance-sheet exposure to both assets.
